source
#include <sysy/sylib.h>
int g = 0;

int func(int n) {
  g = g + n;
  putint(g);
  return g;
}

int main() {
  int i;
  i = getint();
  if (i > 10 && func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;
  i = getint();
  if (i > 11 && func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;
  i = getint();
  if (i <= 99 || func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;
  i = getint();
  if (i <= 100 || func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;
  if (!func(99) && func(100)) i = 1; else i = 0;
  return 0;
}

observation.command: d=/workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo score; cat $d/score.txt; echo 'answer out/err/return?'; for f in answer.out answer.err output.out output.err answer.return output.return answer.compile output.compile; do echo ===$f===; cat $d/$f 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo 'source'; sed -n '1,120p' /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c; echo 'output ll relevant'; grep -n "define.*func\|define.*main\|logic\|if\.then\|_sysy_putint\|call" $d/output.ll | sed -n '1,200p'
